item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: The vice president, in an interview with NBC News, also said text of the memorandum of understanding between the U.S. and Iran won’t be released until Friday.

media:content.media:text: Vice President JD Vance speaks to Nightly News' Tom Llamas on June 15, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance speaks to NBC News' Tom Llamas on Monday.

item.title: Vance says nuclear inspectors ‘absolutely’ will return to Iran under terms to end war

item.dc:creator: Matt Bradley
item.description: Israel’s more focused fight against the Iran-backed Hezbollah militia in Lebanon still has the power to disrupt U.S. efforts to resolve its war with Iran.

media:content.media:text: A man holds an Iranian flag on a street, in Tehran, Iran
media:content.media:description: A man raises an Iranian flag in Tehran after officials said they had reached a deal to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz on June 15, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Israel Strikes In Beirut Southern Suburb, Kills Three
media:content.media:description: The scene of an Israeli strike on a southern suburb of Beirut on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Israel And Iran Trade Attacks, Imperilling Ceasefires
media:content.media:description: Israeli settlers use a tractor to haul away a large section of a downed Iranian missile on the outskirts of Jericho, Israel, earlier this month.

item.title: Renewed fighting between Israel and Hezbollah could scupper the U.S-Iran deal

item.dc:creator: Peter Nicholas
item.description: Trump will touch down in France for the G7 meeting with allies who are at odds with him over a pair of wars.

media:content.media:text: Trump Signs Order Directing Customs Crackdown Amid Trade Gaps
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump during an executive order signing in the Oval Office of the White House in Washington, DC, US, on Wednesday, June 3, 2026. Trump signed an executive order designed to tighten customs enforcement, his latest move to ramp up protectionist trade policies.

item.title: Trump to face European allies at odds with him over two wars at G7 summit

item.description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz
media:content.media:description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

item.title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: At one point toward the end of the first half of the match between Spain and Cape Verde on Monday afternoon, it became apparent that Vozinha, the Cape Verde goalkeeper, was up for the challenge of facing one of the most talented, successful teams in the world

media:content.media:text: Vozinha raises the Cape Verde flag while standing on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Vozinha of Cape Verde celebrates with the flag of Cabo Verde during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group H match against Spain on June 15, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Vozinha of Cape Verde makes a save against Spain on June 15, 2026 in Atlanta.
media:content.media:description: Vozinha makes a save against Spain on Monday.

item.title: Meet the 40-year-old goalkeeper who blanked Spain in Cape Verde’s historic draw

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: What a crazy sports weekend that was — the NBA Finals concluded Saturday night, the World Cup kicked into high gear and the UFC staged fights last night on the White House lawn.

media:content.media:text: IR Iran Training And Press Conference - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The Iranian soccer team train ahead of their World Cup match against New Zealand in Tijuana, Mexico on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Egypt - International Friendly
media:content.media:description: The Iranian soccer team train ahead of their World Cup match against New Zealand in Tijuana, Mexico on Sunday.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: One day after peace agreement, Iran takes field for World Cup

item.description: La emoción se hace sentir en las gradas mientras jugadores y aficionados entonan el himno de Uruguay en la antesala del debut de La Celeste en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 ante Arabia Saudita.

media:content.media:title: ¡La Celeste dice presente! Suena el himno de Uruguay
media:content.media:description: La emoción se hace sentir en las gradas mientras jugadores y aficionados entonan el himno de Uruguay en la antesala del debut de La Celeste en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 ante Arabia Saudita.

item.title: ¡La Celeste dice presente! Suena el himno de Uruguay

item.description: Los aficionados ecuatorianos vistieron a la estatua de Rocky con el jersey de su selección durante el banderazo, lo que pudo haber encendido una maldición en su contra que les costó caer ante Costa de Marfil.

media:content.media:title: Ecuador ¿víctima de la maldición de Rocky en el Mundial?
media:content.media:description: Los aficionados ecuatorianos vistieron a la estatua de Rocky con el jersey de su selección durante el banderazo, lo que pudo haber encendido una maldición en su contra que les costó caer ante Costa de Marfil.

item.title: Ecuador ¿víctima de la maldición de Rocky en el Mundial?

item.description: Los "Faraones" se adelantaron con el golazo de Emam Ashour tras asistencia de Salah en su cumpleaños, pero los "Diablos rojos" rescataron el empate a 22 segundos del ingreso de su gran leyenda, quien intervino en el autogol de Hany para repartir puntos.

media:content.media:title: Salah y Lukaku brillan: Bélgica y Egipto firman emocionante empate en su debut en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Los "Faraones" se adelantaron con el golazo de Emam Ashour tras asistencia de Salah en su cumpleaños, pero los "Diablos rojos" rescataron el empate a 22 segundos del ingreso de su gran leyenda, quien intervino en el autogol de Hany para repartir puntos.

item.title: Salah y Lukaku brillan: Bélgica y Egipto firman emocionante empate en su debut en el Mundial 2026

item.description: Con Valverde y Núñez al frente, Uruguay salió al césped del Hard Rock Stadium para reconocer la cancha y saludar a la afición antes de su debut mundialista ante Arabia Saudita. La Celeste realizó sus primeros movimientos de calentamiento en Miami.

media:content.media:title: Uruguay salta a la cancha y recibe el cariño de su gente en Miami
media:content.media:description: Con Valverde y Núñez al frente, Uruguay salió al césped del Hard Rock Stadium para reconocer la cancha y saludar a la afición antes de su debut mundialista ante Arabia Saudita. La Celeste realizó sus primeros movimientos de calentamiento en Miami.

item.title: Uruguay salta a la cancha y recibe el cariño de su gente en Miami

item.description: Bélgica y Egipto empataron 1-1, en un partido donde los europeos fueron sorprendidos en el primer tiempo y provocó muchas dudas. Es por eso que Tielemans aseguró que su equipo debe apuntalar en muchos aspectos para trascender.

media:content.media:title: El capitán Youri Tielemans elogia a Egipto pero reconoce que Bélgica puede mejorar
media:content.media:description: Bélgica y Egipto empataron 1-1, en un partido donde los europeos fueron sorprendidos en el primer tiempo y provocó muchas dudas. Es por eso que Tielemans aseguró que su equipo debe apuntalar en muchos aspectos para trascender.

item.title: El capitán Youri Tielemans elogia a Egipto pero reconoce que Bélgica puede mejorar

item.description: Guti analiza el inesperado empate de España ante Cabo Verde y asegura que a la Roja le faltó velocidad, precisión e inspiración en los metros finales. Además, destaca que Lamine Yamal fue el único futbolista capaz de cambiar el rumbo del partido.

media:content.media:title: Guti: “España no ha estado fina al borde del área” | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Guti analiza el inesperado empate de España ante Cabo Verde y asegura que a la Roja le faltó velocidad, precisión e inspiración en los metros finales. Además, destaca que Lamine Yamal fue el único futbolista capaz de cambiar el rumbo del partido.

item.title: Guti: “España no ha estado fina al borde del área” | Pasión Mundial

item.description: Mathías Olivera afirmó que Uruguay buscará el gol rápido ante Arabia Saudí, pero con paciencia si se complica. Destacó que el debut suele ser el juego más difícil y que urge ganar para no repetir el amargo empate de Qatar 2022.

media:content.media:title: Mathías Olivera: “Hay que empezar con buen pie”
media:content.media:description: Mathías Olivera afirmó que Uruguay buscará el gol rápido ante Arabia Saudí, pero con paciencia si se complica. Destacó que el debut suele ser el juego más difícil y que urge ganar para no repetir el amargo empate de Qatar 2022.

item.title: Mathías Olivera: “Hay que empezar con buen pie”

item.description: Bielsa habló en zona mixta antes del debut de Uruguay frente a Arabia Saudita en Miami. El técnico calificó el Mundial como el evento más grande del deporte, destacó el orgullo de representar a su país y aseguró que la Celeste llega bien preparada.

media:content.media:title: Bielsa transmite confianza antes del debut de Uruguay ante Arabia Saudita
media:content.media:description: Bielsa habló en zona mixta antes del debut de Uruguay frente a Arabia Saudita en Miami. El técnico calificó el Mundial como el evento más grande del deporte, destacó el orgullo de representar a su país y aseguró que la Celeste llega bien preparada.

item.title: Bielsa transmite confianza antes del debut de Uruguay ante Arabia Saudita

item.description: El técnico francés celebra el empate ante Egipto tras el autogol de Mohamed Hany. La entrada de Romelu Lukaku desconcentró a la defensa egipcia, quien intentó cerrarle el paso al delantero belga.

media:content.media:title: Rudi García, entrenador de Bélgica, explota de júbilo tras el gol a Egipto
media:content.media:description: El técnico francés celebra el empate ante Egipto tras el autogol de Mohamed Hany. La entrada de Romelu Lukaku desconcentró a la defensa egipcia, quien intentó cerrarle el paso al delantero belga.

item.title: Rudi García, entrenador de Bélgica, explota de júbilo tras el gol a Egipto

item.description: Jorge Valdano analiza el decepcionante empate de España ante Cabo Verde y asegura que a la Roja le faltó inspiración en los últimos metros. Además, explica por qué Dani Olmo y Lamine Yamal serán determinantes para el futuro del equipo en el Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Jorge Valdano: “España confundió la paciencia con la lentitud” | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Jorge Valdano analiza el decepcionante empate de España ante Cabo Verde y asegura que a la Roja le faltó inspiración en los últimos metros. Además, explica por qué Dani Olmo y Lamine Yamal serán determinantes para el futuro del equipo en el Mundial.

item.title: Jorge Valdano: “España confundió la paciencia con la lentitud” | Pasión Mundial

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
Ryan J. Reilly
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said Monday that he and his wife are being investigated by the Justice Department and accused President Donald Trump of targeting him for political reasons.“Today, my wife & I joined Donald Trump’s hit list.

media:content.media:text: Governor Newsom speaks while pointing his finger upwards
media:content.media:description: Gov. Gavin Newsom in Hayward, Calif., on March 2, 2026.

item.title: Gavin Newsom says DOJ is investigating him and his wife and blames Trump

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
Dennis Romero
item.description: Eight people are presumed dead after a B-52 bomber crashed Monday at Edwards Air Force Base in California

media:content.media:text: Edwards Air Force Base, Calif., on February 24, 2017.
media:content.media:description: Edwards Air Force Base, Calif., on February 24, 2017.

item.title: 8 presumed dead after Air Force bomber crashes on takeoff at California base

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Vice President JD Vance now concedes that it was “boneheaded” of him in 2021 to call Kamala Harris and other Democrats “childless cat ladies.”The admission comes in Vance’s forthcoming memoir, “Communion,” which is set to be released Tuesday.“One of the dumbest things I ever said came when I argued that ‘childless cat ladies’ across the Democrat Party were running our country into the ground,” Vance writes in the book, a copy of which was obtained and read by NBC News.

media:content.media:text: US-POLITICS-VANCE-AIR FORCE
media:content.media:description: US Vice President JD Vance (R) steps off Air Force Two upon arrival at Joint Base Andrews in Maryland, on May 28, 2026.

item.title: Vance calls his ‘childless cat ladies’ comment ‘one of the dumbest things I ever said’

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: After it launches in August, NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope is expected to survey more of the sky than any space telescope before, at a pace hundreds of times faster.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope in the clean room. Right: a Lego model of Nancy Grace Roman, a pioneer of modern space-based astronomy after whom NASA named its next-generation telescope in 2020.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: A panorama of the Andromeda galaxy.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: A Goddard employee performs final checks on the Roman telescope in the clean room; right: a clock counts down the time remaining until the observatory is launched into space.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

item.title: 1,000 times faster than Hubble: Up close with the NASA space telescope meant to unlock the cosmos

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
Austin Mullen
item.description: James Barker, an executive producer on “Love Island USA,” died “after suffering an unexpected medical emergency” while the show was filming in Fiji, according to ITV America and Peacock.

media:content.media:text: James Barker
media:content.media:description: James Barker

item.title: ‘Love Island USA’ executive producer James Barker dies in Fiji while filming, networks say

item.description: During UFC Freedom 250, the crowd sang “Happy Birthday” to President Donald Trump as the UFC hosted a fight card on the White House’s South Lawn.

media:content.media:title: Crowd at UFC Freedom 250 sings ‘Happy Birthday’ to Trump
media:content.media:description: During UFC Freedom 250, the crowd sang “Happy Birthday” to President Donald Trump as the UFC hosted a fight card on the White House’s South Lawn.

item.title: Crowd at UFC Freedom 250 sings ‘Happy Birthday’ to Trump

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Natalie Keyssar
Owen Hayes
item.description: Ahead of the UFC fight card on the White House lawn, thousands descended on Washington D.C. to celebrate the sport, country and President Trump.

media:content.media:text: Thousands of fans gathered Saturday afternoon on the Ellipse for Freedom 250’s “Fan Fest” event, a sprawling fair of booths and vendors set up in the park south of the White House to celebrate the UFC Fight planned for Sunday night.
Washington, D.C., National Guard members pose for a photos with the "Monster Energy girls."
A split composite image of Diane Scalice standing at a park, and a close up of her Donald Trump socks with fuzzy blond threads sticking out for his hair
Sponsors like Crypto.com, Meta, Monster Energy and Ram Trucks joined UFC-themed games and photo-ops for which fans waited in line for hours to participate.

“I want to get a chance to see (Sean) O'Malley breathe the same air,” said Desiree Jones, of Maryland. Akawsi Mensah, also of Maryland, said: “This is like life-changing. America turns 250, UFC in DC. It's like I can't miss this for the world.”

Christopher Shane Tanner with his daughters Vivianne and Josephine Shane Tanner and his wife, Genevieve Ray Tanner, of Albuquerque, New Mexico: “I happen to fight, and the girls do too. So, we love UFC.”
One day prior to UFC Freedom 250, fans attended an event at The Ellipse that included a ceremonial weigh-in for the fighters. Temperatures in the afternoon reached 90 degrees Fahrenheit.
Portrait of two blonde haired, blue eyed women smiling.
Thousands of fans attended Saturday's event at The Ellipse, just outside the White House.
A split composite image of Jackie Chavez's face close up, left, and three men standing next to one another outside (from left, Henry Wied, George Wied, RJ Carrel)
Fans wore official UFC 250 merchandise at the festival, supporting their favorite fighters like Ilia Topuria and Justin Gaethje in the main event.
Fans watched as parachuters with flags and pyrotechnics jump over The Ellipse.
Fans wait for a turn to take photos inside an official UFC cage at the UFC 250 Freedom Fan Festival.

item.title: Trump, bald eagles and Zac Brown Band: Inside the UFC Freedom 250 Fan Fest

item.dc:creator: Peter Nicholas
Matt Dixon
Katherine Doyle
item.description: Facing one of the roughest patches of his second term, Trump is devoting outsize energy to giving Washington its biggest facelift in living memory.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump reacts during a Cabinet meeting at the White House on May 27, 2026.

media:content.media:text: The Washington Monument rises above the horizon and is reflected in the water of the reflecting pool.
media:content.media:description: The half-filled Reflecting Pool on the National Mall in Washington earlier this month.

item.title: Despite war, inflation and sinking polling, Trump takes comfort in giving D.C. a face-lift

item.description: During UFC Freedom 250, the crowd sang “Happy Birthday” to President Donald Trump as the UFC hosted a fight card on the White House’s South Lawn.

media:content.media:title: Crowd at UFC Freedom 250 sings ‘Happy Birthday’ to Trump
media:content.media:description: During UFC Freedom 250, the crowd sang “Happy Birthday” to President Donald Trump as the UFC hosted a fight card on the White House’s South Lawn.

item.title: Crowd at UFC Freedom 250 sings ‘Happy Birthday’ to Trump
